overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Zelda game showing the character Link exploring Uten Marsh, a wetland area with shallow water, wildflowers, and ancient stone monuments. The character runs through the marsh toward distant mountains and large rock formations under a bright partly cloudy sky.

events.description: location text 'Uten Marsh' appears in the lower right corner
large curved ancient stone pillars come into view in the distance

agents.ego_description: Link runs through shallow marsh water surrounded by red and yellow wildflowers, heading toward distant stone structures

entered.detail: clusters of red flowers growing in the shallow marsh water
yellow flowers mixed with red flowers in the marsh
shallow water covering the ground with visible lily pads
large green tree with thick trunk on the left side
green lily pads floating on the water surface
tall ancient stone monuments curving toward each other

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in Uten Marsh with Link running through shallow water filled with red and yellow wildflowers. The camera follows from behind as large ancient stone pillars appear in the distance, and the character moves through tall grass toward these monuments.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marsh with ancient stone monuments and distant mountains

events.description: character passes between two massive curved stone pillars
stone tower on distant mountain becomes clearly visible

agents.ego_description: Link continues running through the marsh, passing between ancient stone pillars and heading toward a large tree with mountains in the background

entered.detail: large gnarled tree with twisted branches on the left
rocky mountains forming the horizon boundary
tall thin tower structure atop the distant mountain
steep rocky cliff face on the mountain

segments.scene_description: Link passes between the massive curved stone pillars as the landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains with a tall tower structure. The marsh continues with scattered trees and rocky terrain becoming visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: marsh edge approaching rocky mountain terrain with ancient ruins

events.description: camera turns toward the sun creating bright lens flare and glare
approaching massive stone arch and rock formations in the distance

agents.ego_description: Link moves toward the mountain base through shallow water and grass, heading toward large rock formations with the sun directly ahead

entered.detail: large natural stone arch formation against the sky
bright sun creating lens flare effects
scattered stone structures and pillars in the grass

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Link approaching the rocky mountain base as the camera turns toward the bright sun, creating significant lens flare. The terrain transitions from water to grassy marsh as massive stone arches and ancient ruins come into view ahead, with the mountain range now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant wetland that gradually opens into a vast mountain vista. It begins with Link running through shallow waters filled with red and yellow wildflowers, moving through tall grass as ancient stone pillars emerge in the distance. As the character approaches these monuments, the camera follows him directly between the massive curved pillars, causing the horizon to expand. The scene then shifts from the enclosed marshland to a wide-open landscape, revealing scattered trees and rocky terrain that lead toward distant mountains and a tall tower structure under a bright sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shallow wetlands toward the imposing base of a rocky mountain range. It begins with Link traversing the water's edge, where the terrain gradually transitions into a grassy marsh. As the camera advances, massive stone arches and ancient ruins emerge from the landscape, while the mountain range becomes clearly visible to the left. The scene finally shifts as the camera turns toward the bright sun, bathing the ancient ruins in a brilliant light that creates a significant lens flare.
